issues.description: Card text specifies 'choose one' with two mutually exclusive options, but DSL lists both actions sequentially without choice mechanism. Should use choice structure or separate conditional branches.
Second action (DrawCard) requires condition 'If you have 6 or less cards in your hand' but no condition is attached to this action in the DSL.

Condition 'If your Leader is multicolored' should use LeaderHasAnyType or similar leader-type validation, not HasCardOnBoard with name parameter. Current structure is incorrect for checking Leader properties.
